title: Iteration 02.3: Phase 2, Post-Review, Full E2E
description: Screen 9 (Create-List), Screen 10 (21-40), thinking H, Screens 11-14, Add more later skip, complete state machine. HARD GATE: Write and run Playwright E2E tests (e2e/fo-13.test.ts) in real Chromium - happy path, skip-context, add-more-later must all pass. Also run FO-12 E2E regression (e2e/fo-12.test.ts) and confirm green. Iteration CANNOT close without passing E2E.
